message:
fix(engine): additional hardening — hashing, validation, correctness fixes, and tests

Deterministic hashing improvements:
- bifurcation_boundary_scanner: use serde_json instead of Debug for
  BifurcationType and LaneAction serialization in content hashes
- capability_witness: length-prefix each capability string with 4-byte
  big-endian length to prevent delimiter collisions
- react_package_cohort: sort edge cases by case_id before hashing

Validation and correctness:
- ir_contract: verify IR4 header source_hash matches expected IR3 hash;
  reject witnesses with missing or mismatched source hashes
- saga_orchestrator: reject duplicate saga IDs (SagaAlreadyExists error);
  insert saga into map before emitting creation event
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph: handle empty root_modules in graph_depth;
  initialize root depths to 0; skip unreachable nodes instead of defaulting
- feature_parity_tracker: fix InProgress status to trigger when total > 0
  (was requiring passing > 0, missing zero-passing-but-has-tests case);
  correct error code from FE-FPT-0007 to FE-FPT-0008 for gate failures

Serialization:
- hostcall_batch_transport: add serde(rename_all = "snake_case") to
  RegionState and MembraneRejectionReason enums for stable JSON output

Bug fix:
- frankenctl: fix react-compile and react-build exit codes from 25 to 0
  (success should return 0, not a non-standard code)

Tests:
- feature_parity_tracker_integration: updated for status logic changes
- saga_orchestrator_enrichment_integration: test duplicate saga rejection
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph_enrichment_integration: expanded depth
  and checkpoint tests for empty/missing node edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
